name: Anhui Hyea Aromas Co., Ltd.
summary: Anhui Hyea Aromas Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, production, and sale of fine chemicals. It offers aroma lactones, such as gamma-hexalactone, gamma-heptalactone, gamma-octalactone, gamma-decalactone, gamma-dodecalactone, gamma-undecalactone, gamma-nonalactone, delta-decalactone, delta-dodecalactone, 2-nonanone, gamma-valerolactone, octanolactone, and undecanoic delta-lactone. The company was founded in 2002 and is based in Qianshan, China.
